ActionItems: Review monthly dues collection against operating expenses before next treasurer meeting
BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Local 792 treasurer-assist review of monthly operating break-even prepared during 2019 bookkeeping handoff

CurrentState.Note: Figures pulled from dormant 2019 ledger; values not refreshed since handoff

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Monthly dues must cover fixed rent and insurance before any reserve contribution

Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: New total expenses divided by monthly dues rate equals members needed to break even
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Modest rent increase requires a few additional dues-paying members to stay even
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Rent increased to $750/mo

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Higher rent increase requires more dues-paying members or a dues rate increase to stay even
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Rent increased to $850/mo
